info.description: REST API for managing technical processes, products, documents, and resources in the PSS application
info.title: Tech Process Viewer API

password.description: Password (optional, not used in current implementation)

id.description: Business process ID (optional, will be generated if not provided)

parent_id.description: Parent process ID (if this is a sub-process)

element_id.description: ID of existing process to add as sub-element

id.description: Product ID (optional, will be generated if not provided)

item_id.description: System ID of item to link document to

document_id.description: System ID of document to link

post.description:
Connect to PSS database and obtain a session key.

**Usage:**
1. Call this endpoint with connection parameters
2. Copy the `session_key` from the response
3. Click "Authorize" button in Swagger UI
4. Paste the session_key into the value field
5. All subsequent API calls will use this session key

**Default values** will connect to local development database.
Disconnect from PSS database and invalidate the session key.

get.description: Get list of available databases from PSS server. No authentication required.
Check if currently connected to a database.
Get list of business processes with optional filtering
Get business process details by ID

post.description: Add a sub-process element to a business process

delete.description: Remove an element from a business process

post.description: Add a resource to a business process

get.description: Get list of all entity types defined in the dictionary
Get entity type schema and metadata
Get count of instances for entity type (fast query)
Get instances of entity type with pagination (start/size)

post.description: Create a new instance of entity type

get.description: Get instance details with resolved references

get.summary: Resolve a reference for inline display
get.description: Get instance details with reference attribute info for inline expansion
Get list of products with optional filtering
Get product details by ID
Get all versions of a product
Get product version details
Get BOM structure for a product

post.description: Add a component to product BOM

get.description: Get list of documents with optional filtering
Get document details by ID
Download file content from document
Get all documents linked to an item

post.description: Link a document to an item

get.description: Search apl_document by id (substring LIKE). Param: ?q=<text>
Get list of resources with optional filtering
Get resource details by ID
Get list of resource types
Get list of organizations with optional filtering
Get organization details by ID
List all apl_characteristic definitions
Get all characteristic values attached to an item (PDF / BP / ...)

post.description: Create a new apl_*_characteristic_value linked to an item

put.description: Update value (re-saves apl_*_characteristic_value with new scope/val)

post.description: Запустить все сценарии указанной группы. Возвращает JSON-отчёт и сохраняет копию в openapi/test_API_results_<group>.json
Запустить все группы по порядку. Каждая группа сохраняется отдельно.

get.description: Последний сохранённый JSON-отчёт. Если ?group= указан — для одной группы; иначе — словарь по всем группам, у которых есть история.
Метаданные групп из test_API_settings.json (без выполнения тестов).

tags.name: test_runner
tags.description: Run grouped API smoke-tests defined in openapi/test_API_settings.json
